initial: FEB 28: US-Israel joint strikes hit 500 targets across Iran — Khamenei killed
Iran retaliates with 500+ ballistic missiles and 2,000 drones — 60% targeting US forces
IRGC Navy deploys across strait — tanker MV Advantage Sweet seized with $50M cargo
IRIS Dena frigate sunk by US Navy in first major naval engagement since 1988
Oil surges past $110/barrel — Lloyd's suspends war risk coverage for Gulf transit
Three US carrier strike groups deployed: Lincoln, Truman, Carl Vinson
Mojtaba Khamenei emerges as likely Supreme Leader successor — IRGC backs him
KC-135 tanker crashes during combat ops — 3 airmen killed

mine_hazards: BREAKING: Tanker {tankerId} strikes mine near strait
intercept: USN intercepts IRGC attempt on tanker — seizure prevented
roe_aggressive: Aggressive ROE leads to dangerous confrontation
carrier_deploy: USS Eisenhower carrier strike group enters Gulf of Oman
carrier_withdraw: Carrier strike group withdraws from region
mine_detection: Intel detects Iranian mine-laying in strait
crisis_deescalate: Crisis de-escalated. Tensions returning to baseline.
weekly_cooldown: Weekly diplomatic cool-down reduces escalation level
unique_resource_warning_inverted: {uniqueResourceName} critical — one more leak and it's over
polarization_warnings: Protests erupt in major cities over war policy
Armed militias mobilize — domestic tensions critical
assassination_warning: Intel: credible threat against senior officials detected
approval_warnings: Congressional allies distancing — approval dangerously low
Impeachment proceedings discussed behind closed doors
international_standing_warning: Major allies publicly criticize US actions
iran_faction_hardliner_moves: IRGC fast-boats conducted exercises 12nm from USS Eisenhower. They practiced formation attacks.
Iranian state media aired a documentary glorifying the IRGC Navy. Tangsiri appeared in uniform.
New anti-ship missile batteries moved to coastal positions. Satellite shows launch-ready config.
IRGC social media posted training videos of boarding operations. Caption: "The strait is ours."
Tangsiri gave a speech: "Every American vessel in our waters is a legitimate target."
Iranian naval exercises announced near the strait. Largest since 2019.
IRGC proxy channels activated. Houthi rhetoric matches Tehran talking points word-for-word.
Mojtaba Khamenei visited IRGC Navy HQ. Photos show him inspecting fast-attack craft.
iran_faction_moderate_moves: Iran's foreign ministry called for "dialogue without preconditions." Analysts note the phrase echoes 2015.
Araghchi gave an interview to Al Jazeera emphasizing "mutual respect and diplomatic solutions."
Iran released two detained foreign nationals from Evin prison. No demands were made.
Iranian state media ran an editorial criticizing unnamed military officials for "unnecessary provocations."
Araghchi was seen meeting the Omani ambassador. Back-channel activity suspected.
Iranian moderate newspapers published op-eds calling for economic normalization with the West.
Mojtaba Khamenei praised "the wisdom of patience" in a Friday sermon. Analysts are divided.
Iran offered to allow IAEA access to a previously restricted site. Conditions unclear.
iran_faction_ambiguous_moves: The Supreme Leader gave a sermon praising both military strength and patience. Analysts divided.
Iran announced a new oil barter deal with China, bypassing US sanctions entirely.
IRGC and Foreign Ministry issued contradictory statements within hours. Power struggle visible.
Iranian parliament debated the crisis openly for the first time. Both factions claimed support.
crisis_escalation: CRISIS: Iran deploys additional naval assets to strait
MAJOR CRISIS: Iran announces mining of shipping channels
WAR FOOTING: Iran mobilizes ground forces along coast
proxy_events: Houthi forces attack commercial vessel in Red Sea
Iraqi militia rockets hit US base in region
Hezbollah threatens Israel border — regional escalation

carrier_strike: Iran test-fires anti-ship missiles in response to carrier deployment
Carrier presence deters IRGC patrols — shipping confidence rises
Carrier deployment dominates the news cycle — public rallies behind the mission
F-35 from carrier shoots down Iranian Shahed drone approaching task force
Iran deploys anti-ship ballistic missiles in response to carrier — "carrier killer" threat
naval_patrol: USN patrol intercepts suspicious vessel — clear signal to Iran
Patrol encounters IRGC fast boats — tense standoff
Patrol discovers Iranian explosive drone boats drifting in shipping lane
USS destroyer escorts tanker through strait — insurance companies take notice
active_intercept: Aggressive ROE triggers near-miss with Iranian vessel
missile_strike: Precision strike footage goes viral — world holds its breath
Iran vows retaliation for strikes on sovereign territory
regional_deterrence: Joint ops degrade Houthi launch capabilities
back_channel: Back-channel produces a small breakthrough — Iran releases two detained sailors
Back-channel talks leaked to press — hawks on both sides furious
gulf_coalition: Allied naval forces conduct joint patrol — show of unity
Coalition partner demands more say in rules of engagement
Japan reluctantly sends two destroyers after arm-twisting — coalition grows
Coalition allies refuse burden-sharing — US carries 80% of costs
summit_proposal: Iran considers summit proposal — hardliners debate internally
humanitarian_corridor: Humanitarian aid reaches affected populations — viral footage
targeted_sanctions: Sanctioned IRGC commander vows revenge — Iran seizes a tanker
Sanctions bite — Iranian economy contracts further
China quietly increases Iranian oil purchases to circumvent sanctions
Dark fleet tanker caught doing ship-to-ship transfer of Iranian oil
Secondary sanctions catch a Chinese bank — Beijing protests formally
maximum_pressure: Maximum pressure pushes Iran into a corner — provocations spike
Oil prices surge on maximum pressure announcement
Iran's currency collapses 15% — street protests in Tehran and Isfahan
Iran accelerates uranium enrichment in response to pressure
reserve_release: Reserve release calms oil markets — gas prices drop
trade_incentives: Trade incentives spark debate — "rewarding bad behavior?"
Iran moderates gain leverage from trade talks
sigint_sweep: SIGINT intercept reveals IRGC mine-laying plans
cyber_operation: Cyber op disrupts IRGC comms — boats go silent for hours
Iran detects cyber intrusion — retaliates with own cyber attack
Cyber op disables IRGC naval command network for 48 hours — boats go dark
Iran's APT33 retaliates — hits US port systems with wiper malware
drone_surveillance: Drone reveals Iranian military buildup at Bandar Abbas
Iran shoots down a surveillance drone
MQ-9 Reaper tracks Iranian minelayer — coordinates shared with minesweepers
media_blitz: Media campaign goes viral — public sentiment shifts
congressional_briefing: Bipartisan support emerges after classified briefing
america_first: Iran sees withdrawal signals — aggression increases
Troops coming home makes front page — base energized
Allies panic at withdrawal rhetoric — coalition fractures
mine_countermeasures: MCM vessel clears 3 mines from shipping lane — safe transit restored
Combat diver killed disarming Iranian mine — first MCM casualty
Drone submarine maps entire Iranian minefield — invaluable data
submarine_warfare: US submarine tracks Iranian Kilo-class sub for 72 hours — full pattern of life
Near-collision between US and Iranian submarines in shallow waters
Submarine intelligence reveals IRGC coastal battery locations
ballistic_missile_defense: Patriot battery intercepts Iranian ballistic missile targeting Al Udeid — system works
THAAD deployment reassures Gulf allies — Bahrain and UAE increase cooperation
Interceptor miss — debris falls in populated area. 3 civilian casualties
oil_diplomacy: Saudi Arabia announces 2M barrel/day production increase — markets rally
OPEC+ deal falls apart — Russia blocks the increase
IEA coordinated reserve release calms speculation
insurance_backstop: Government insurance restores tanker traffic — 12 ships transit in 24 hours
Insurance program cost overruns — $3B more than projected
humint_iran: Asset inside IRGC reveals planned seizure operation — preempted
HUMINT asset compromised — Iran arrests double agent. Source network at risk
Iranian defector provides detailed order of battle for IRGC Navy
electronic_warfare: EA-18G Growler jams IRGC command frequency — fast boats lose coordination
Iran adapts to jamming — switches to fiber optic landlines
Full spectrum EW blinds IRGC radar network for 6 hours — shipping transits freely
war_crimes_tribunal: ICC fact-finding team documents Iranian mine-laying — legal case builds
Tribunal investigation also scrutinizes US civilian casualties — awkward

Gulf states increase oil production
Insurance premiums for strait transit increase
China urges restraint
Gas prices at pump hit 5-year high in US
Iranian moderates push for diplomatic solution
India declares energy emergency — LPG diverted from industry to households
Japan warns of rolling blackouts if strait remains closed
South Korea sends intelligence-sharing liaison to CENTCOM
Lloyd's of London raises war risk premiums 300% for strait transit
Iranian rial crashes to historic low — street protests erupt
Russia quietly ships advanced anti-ship missiles to Iran via Caspian route
Global shipping companies announce permanent rerouting via Cape of Good Hope
OPEC+ emergency meeting called — Saudi Arabia offers to increase production
Iran offers to "down-blend" enriched uranium as diplomatic gesture
Pentagon confirms Iran retains 80-90% of naval fast boat fleet despite strikes
US trucking industry warns of supply chain collapse if oil stays above $140
Chinese spy ship detected in Gulf of Oman — sharing data with IRGC?
European Central Bank emergency meeting — strait crisis threatening EU economy
Iranian rial hits record low — 800,000 to the dollar
Bahrain closes US Naval Forces Central Command to non-essential personnel
Norway sends frigate to join coalition — first Arctic nation contribution
Iranian diaspora protests in London, Berlin, and Toronto — "Regime must fall"
US trucking industry halts non-essential routes — diesel rationing begins
Australian PM pledges naval support — HMAS Hobart en route
IRGC propaganda video shows missile strike simulation on US carrier
Gold hits $3,200/oz as investors flee to safe havens
Iranian FM Araghchi offers "conditional ceasefire" through Swiss intermediary
Pentagon confirms Iran using North Korean missile technology in latest launches

Iran transfers long-range ballistic missiles to Iraqi militias

overnight_news_filler: A quiet day in the strait. Tankers transit normally.
Diplomatic channels remain open. No major incidents.
Markets hold steady. The situation is unchanged.

polymarket: WIRE — Polymarket: 'Strait of Hormuz fully reopened by April 30' trading at 18 cents. Down from 34 cents last week.
WIRE — Polymarket: 'US-Iran ceasefire by June 30' at 56 cents. Highest-volume geopolitics market in platform history at $21M.
WIRE — Polymarket: 'Oil above $150 by March 31' surges to 68 cents after overnight IRGC threat. $38M in volume.
WIRE — Polymarket: 'US recession by December 2026' jumps to 42 cents from 24 cents at start of month.
WIRE — Polymarket: Six wallets flagged by onchain analysts for suspected insider trading on Iran strike timing. Combined profit: $1.2M.
WIRE — Polymarket creates market: 'Trump approval below 35% by April 15?' Currently trading at 29 cents.
WIRE — Polymarket: 'Iran regime change by December 2026' drops to 12 cents. Post-Khamenei succession appears stable.
WIRE — Polymarket: 'US ground invasion of Iran by June 2026' at 16 cents. Volume spiking after Hegseth's 15,000 targets claim.
ECON — Polymarket traders have wagered $529M on Iran-related contracts since Feb 28. Platform's largest-ever event.
WIRE — Polymarket: 'Joe Kent-style resignation within 30 days?' New market launches at 34 cents after NCTC director quits.
DOMESTIC — Polymarket: 'Trump impeachment proceedings by 2027' rises to 19 cents from 8 cents pre-war.
WIRE — Polymarket: 'Kushner financial scandal leads to investigation?' Trading at 41 cents. $7M in volume.
ambient_low_tension: FLASH — UKMTO reports routine maritime traffic through Strait of Hormuz. 14 vessels transited in last 24 hours without incident.
WIRE — Lloyd's of London maintains Gulf war risk premium at 0.4% hull value. Market sources describe pricing as 'stabilizing but elevated.'
SIGINT — NSA intercept summary: IRGC Naval Command communications volume down 30% from 72-hour average. Assessment: reduced operational tempo.
HUMINT — CIA Station Muscat reports Omani foreign minister scheduled three calls with Tehran today. Source assesses 'diplomatic track is active.'
ECON — Brent crude trading at $98.40/barrel, down $3.20 from yesterday's close. Asian markets mixed on reduced threat assessment.
WIRE — AP: Saudi Aramco confirms 1.2 million barrels shipped through Strait of Hormuz overnight. 'Operations continue as normal,' spokesperson says.
DIPLO — State Department daily brief: No new incidents. European allies 'cautiously optimistic' about maritime security posture.
INTEL — NGA satellite pass 0340Z: Iranian fast boat pens at Bandar Abbas show 70% occupancy. Boats are in port. Assessment: non-threatening posture.
WIRE — Reuters: Insurance premiums for Gulf transit drop 15 basis points. Shipping industry sources describe 'cautious return to normalcy.'
DOMESTIC — Gallup daily tracking: Presidential approval at 54%. Issue focus shifting from Iran to domestic economy.
ambient_medium_tension: FLASH — UKMTO Advisory 2026/034: Vessels advised exercise caution in eastern approach to Strait of Hormuz. Increased IRGC patrol activity observed.
WIRE — Oil futures spike $4.80 on reports of IRGC live-fire exercises near Qeshm Island. Brent at $112.30.
SIGINT — IRGC Naval encrypted burst transmission intercepted 0247Z. Decryption pending. Volume consistent with operational coordination.
HUMINT — Source CARDINAL reports internal IRGC debate between hardliner and moderate factions. Hardliners pushing for 'demonstrative action.' Confidence: MEDIUM.
ECON — GasBuddy national average: $4.23/gallon, up 8 cents from yesterday. Patrick De Haan estimates 80% chance of $5 by month end.
WIRE — Bloomberg: China's COSCO Shipping suspends new bookings for Gulf-bound vessels pending 'security reassessment.'
FLASH — Fifth Fleet reports Iranian drone observed conducting surveillance of USS Bataan escort group. Drone was not engaged.
INTEL — DIA assessment: Iran has repositioned three Noor anti-ship missile batteries to forward positions along the strait. Launchers are mobile, making targeting difficult.
DIPLO — UN Security Council emergency session requested by UK and France. Russia expected to veto any resolution authorizing maritime enforcement.
WIRE — FT: Polymarket odds on 'Strait of Hormuz fully reopened by April 30' drop to 22 cents from 31 cents.
DOMESTIC — Fox News poll: 58% of Americans support military action to protect shipping. 61% say gas prices are 'biggest concern.'
SIGINT — Intercepted IRGC voice communication: 'All units prepare for extended deployment. Rotation schedule cancelled.' Assessment: Iran is not standing down.
WIRE — Maersk diverts 12 container ships to Cape of Good Hope route. Transit time adds 14 days. Supply chain analysts warn of 'cascading delays.'
INTEL — Satellite imagery shows Iranian minelayer IRIS Hormuz departing Bandar Abbas. Assessment: potential mine-laying operation imminent.
ECON — Qatar Energy suspends LNG spot market sales. European natural gas futures up 18% in overnight trading.
ambient_high_tension: FLASH — PRIORITY — UKMTO reports suspected anti-ship missile launch from Iranian coastline. No impact confirmed. All vessels advised to shelter.
FLASH — Three IRGC fast boats approaching commercial traffic at high speed in eastern lane. Fifth Fleet assets moving to intercept.
WIRE — EMERGENCY — Oil futures halted limit-up at $147/barrel after reports of mine detonation near Musandam Peninsula.
SIGINT — CRITIC — NSA reports massive spike in IRGC communications across all bands. Pattern consistent with pre-operational coordination.
FLASH — Iranian state TV broadcasting live from IRGC Naval Command: 'The Strait of Hormuz is closed. Any vessel that enters will be set ablaze.'
HUMINT — Source CARDINAL has gone dark. Last transmission 14 hours ago. Station unable to establish contact. Assessment: possible compromise.
WIRE — AP URGENT: Explosion reported near oil tanker in eastern approach to strait. Cause unknown. Fire visible from Omani coast.
ECON — Polymarket: 'Oil above $150 by March 31' trading at 68 cents. 'US recession by June' at 42 cents, up from 24 cents one week ago.
INTEL — IMMEDIATE — NGA confirms: at least four sea mines detected in shipping lane via synthetic aperture radar. Mine countermeasures requested.
FLASH — CENTCOM SITREP: Iranian ballistic missile launches detected from interior positions targeting Al Udeid Air Base, Qatar. THAAD engaging.
DIPLO — Swiss embassy Tehran reports Iranian foreign ministry 'unreachable' since 0200Z. All diplomatic channels silent.
WIRE — Reuters URGENT: Saudi Arabia and UAE place militaries on highest alert level. GCC joint statement calls situation 'existential threat to regional security.'
DOMESTIC — Mass protests reported in Houston, Los Angeles, and Chicago against military escalation. Counter-protests in Dallas and Nashville.
FLASH — GPS jamming reported across central strait. Multiple vessels reporting navigation equipment failures. USCG issues emergency advisory.
WIRE — Pentagon press secretary: 'We are aware of the situation. The Secretary of Defense will brief the President within the hour.'

hegseth_override: SecDef overrides chain of command — direct military action ordered
fuentes_address_nation: National address: "America First, America Always." Base rallies.
